query: SELECT id, title, category, status, readTimeMinutes FROM blog_posts ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 25;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4VFjuiBDjCy66KV.dcd9224b4f92 --database RrG9k2uFQkqVyNWK8WEbxj --execute SELECT id, title, category, status, readTimeMinutes FROM blog_posts ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 25;
